name: How is fault decided in work ladder fall cases?
description: Comp no-fault; suits need negligence proof.

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in work ladder fall cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault; suits need negligence proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp no-fault**; third-party negligence proven via unsafe ladder/site.[1][6]

OSHA violations, improper equipment key.[5]

- Expert on ladder standards.
- Witness setup errors.
- Maintenance logs.

Employer liable via comp; others sued.
